title: A Direct Proof of the Reflection Principle for Brownian Motion
journal: S. J. Dilworth and D. Wright, A Direct Proof of the Reflection Principle for Brownian Motion, Theory of Stochastic Processes 21(37) (2016), no. 2, pg. 1-3
journal_ref: S. J. Dilworth and D. Wright, A Direct Proof of the Reflection Principle for Brownian Motion, Theory of Stochastic Processes 21(37) (2016), no. 2, pg. 1-3
abstract: We present a self-contained proof of the reflection principle for Brownian Motion.
